name: Optimize Existing Fab 12i P3 / No New External Expansion
description: Prioritize Fab 12i P3 ramp, customer qualification, utilization, and capital efficiency before committing to new non-Singapore expansion.
best_fit_conditions: Fab 12i P3 ramp and customer qualification remain the dominant execution priority
External OSAT, support, or manufacturing options lack validated customer demand and ROIC
UMC wants to preserve optionality for future Malaysia / Vietnam / Thailand / Philippines / Indonesia opportunities
key_risks: May defer useful ecosystem learning if external triggers become visible
Requires disciplined tracking of customer, partner, incentive, and ROIC triggers

name: Sales Office
description: Regional account coverage, customer relationship management, demand sensing, and government / ecosystem relationships.
best_fit_conditions: Low-capex market sensing before larger commitments
key_risks: Low impact if account ownership is unclear
Can duplicate Singapore or Taiwan coverage

name: Customer Engineering Hub
description: FAE support, design-in support, quality issue coordination, Fab 12i customer support, and technical account support.
best_fit_conditions: Clear escalation path into Fab 12i and Taiwan engineering teams
key_risks: Weak value if limited to generic support
Requires training, escalation discipline, and customer validation

name: Packaging / OSAT Partnership
description: Partner-first access to advanced packaging, testing, assembly coordination, and turnkey wafer-to-package support.
key_risks: Partner economics may not support UMC differentiation
Customer qualification and IP boundaries require diligence

name: Foundry / Manufacturing Expansion
description: Direct manufacturing capacity or specialty process expansion. Highest capex and execution risk.
